issue.title: [Feature] Team invites
issue.body:
## User outcome
Workspace admins can invite teammates by email.

## Main flow
An admin enters an email, sends the invite, and sees the pending invite in the workspace settings.

## Detailed UI/UX direction
Place the Invite teammate button in the top-right of Team settings. Clicking it opens a modal with an email field, helper text, and a primary CTA. Show pending invites below the member list with clear pending and expired states.

## Acceptance criteria
1. Admins can send an invite to a valid email address.
2. The invited email is shown as pending until accepted.
3. Duplicate active invites are prevented.

## Edge cases
Expired invites and already-joined users are handled clearly.

## Technical, test, and docs impact
Needs invite persistence, email delivery, admin UI, and updated onboarding docs.

artifact.title: Feature spec: Team invites
artifact.summary: Allow workspace admins to invite teammates by email.

sections.User outcome: Workspace admins can invite teammates by email.
Main flow: System sends the invite and records a pending state.
Detailed UI/UX direction: Place the Invite teammate button in the top-right of Team settings.
Open a modal with an email field, helper text, and a primary CTA.
Show pending invites below the member list with clear pending and expired states.
Acceptance criteria: Admins can send an invite to a valid email address.
Pending invites remain visible until accepted or revoked.
Edge cases: Already-joined users cannot be re-invited silently.
Docs and rollout impact: Add rollout notes for email provider configuration.
